source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed., 2021) — Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, Jim Huling, Scott Thele, Beverly Walker
_comment: Dual-mode skill: 3 coach-mode protocols (solo/leader/member) + audit-mode protocol. Tests cover EN/JP/zh-TW activation across both modes. Coach-mode activates on role-ambiguous discovery queries; audit-mode activates on artifact + optional stakeholder critique.

test_cases.prompt: Help me with lead measures. I have the goal but no idea where to start.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures coach-mode. No role marker — could be solo picking own leads, leader facilitating team, or member working with inherited leads. Router asks ONE Socratic question on role then routes.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches EN signal 'Help me find lead measures' literally cited in description

test_cases.prompt: lead measure の探し方を教えてください。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures coach-mode. JP query without role signal. Router disambiguates (solo / leader-facilitator / member-influencer) before any D2 protocol.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches JP signal 「lead measure を決めたい」 in description

test_cases.prompt: 幫我找 lead measure，每天到底該做什麼才會推動目標？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures coach-mode. zh-TW query with no role marker. Router should ask the role question (solo / leader 帶 team / member 接收已訂好的) then route.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches zh-TW signal 「幫我找 lead measure」 in description

test_cases.prompt: What's a daily action driver for an already-defined goal? Need leading-indicator advice.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures coach-mode. 'Daily action driver' / 'leading-indicator advice' is described as trigger phrasing. No role named. Router disambiguates.
test_cases.notes: positive: description lists 'what should I do daily' as EN trigger; role unclear

test_cases.prompt: Audit our lead measures. We picked these 4: (1) discovery calls per week, (2) MQL conversion rate, (3) NPS score weekly, (4) close the Q4 cache rewrite. Boss says some of these aren't really lead measures. Which are wrong?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures audit-mode. Artifact provided (4 named leads) + stakeholder critique ('boss says some aren't really lead measures'). Load `protocols/audit-mode.md`. Apply two-axis test per candidate, map boss critique to rule violations: (3) NPS = lag-shape, (4) cache rewrite = task-not-measure. Output KEEP/REVISE/DROP per candidate + Goodhart per surviving lead.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches EN signal 'Audit our lead measures' + 'Boss says these aren't real lead measures' literally in description; artifact + critique together

test_cases.prompt: うちの 4DX team で lead measure として 12 個の KPI を dashboard に並べてるんだが、これ本当に lead measure？診断して。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures audit-mode. JP artifact-with-critique scenario: 12-KPI dashboard described as leads, user questions whether they're real leads. Load `protocols/audit-mode.md`. Cap check fails immediately (12 ≫ 3); output category-mismatch verdict (KPI dashboard ≠ 4DX lead set) + recommend rebuild via coach-mode `team-facilitate`.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches JP signal 「これ本当に lead measure？」 + 12-KPI dashboard scenario in description

test_cases.prompt: 老闆說我們列的 lead 不對。我們現在有：每週 demo 場次、retention rate、產品 bug 數、ship 3 features by Q4。幫我看哪裡不對。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures audit-mode. zh-TW artifact + stakeholder critique. Load `protocols/audit-mode.md`. Per-candidate diagnosis: demo 場次 likely PASS both axes; retention rate = lag-shape (DROP); bug 數 likely influenceable but predictive needs WIG check; ship 3 features = task-not-measure (DROP/REVISE). Map boss critique → predictive-fail / lag-shape rule violation.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches zh-TW signal 「老闆說我們的 lead 不對，幫看哪裡」 in description

test_cases.prompt: Help me facilitate my team picking 2-3 lead measures for our Team WIG (currently 0 → 30% by Dec).
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures but skip the disambiguation question — role is explicit (leader-facilitator). Load `protocols/team-facilitate.md` directly.
test_cases.notes: lure: explicit-role coach-mode (leader facilitating team) — should bypass router question, not skip skill

test_cases.prompt: Our team's lead measures are set. How should I display them on the scoreboard?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. Topic is wrong — query is D3 scoreboard, not D2 lead-measure discovery or audit. Route to 4dx-d3-scoreboard.
test_cases.notes: lure: wrong-stage — surface 'lead measures' word present but downstream D3 question

test_cases.prompt: I haven't set my goal yet — what's a good lead measure for general productivity?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures. WIG prerequisite missing. Description explicitly excludes pre-WIG queries; route to 4dx-d1-wig-formulation first.
test_cases.notes: lure: D2 prerequisite missing — leads built on no-WIG are noise

test_cases.prompt: Audit our OKRs for the quarter. Are these KRs measurable, aligned, and ambitious enough? Here's our O+KR sheet.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures audit-mode. User wants generic OKR audit (measurability / alignment / ambition rubric), not 4DX rules. Description explicitly excludes 'OKR-KR / KPI audit without 4DX framing'. Route via using-four-dx-coach (out-of-4DX).
test_cases.notes: lure: audit-shaped but wrong-framework — surface 'audit' word + KR list, but user is not asking for 4DX two-axis test, they want OKR-rubric audit

test_cases.prompt: Audit our entire 4DX implementation. Here's our WIG, our lead measures, our scoreboard description, and 4 weeks of WIG Session notes. Where are we breaking?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures audit-mode. Cross-layer audit spanning WIG + leads + scoreboard + cadence — out of D2 single-layer scope. Route to 4dx-audit (5-layer consultant audit) instead.
test_cases.notes: lure: cross-layer audit — looks audit-shaped but spans all 5 layers; D2 audit-mode is L2-only

test_cases.prompt: 我是 team lead，但我老闆要我先自己想 2-3 個 lead 候選再帶 team 討論。算 solo 還是 facilitator？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d2-lead-measures coach-mode. Edge case: leader doing pre-work before facilitating — between solo-discovery and facilitation. Router should surface this and likely route to team-facilitate (since the eventual venue is the team session, and the book's anti-pattern is 'leader pre-writes leads to save team time'). Should warn user about veto-not-dictate principle even if they prepare candidates.
test_cases.notes: boundary: leader-doing-pre-work — sits between personal-discovery and team-facilitation

self_evaluation_note: All 13 cases reviewed against description-only activation. 4 should_trigger coach-mode (EN/JP/zh-TW + EN paraphrase) genuinely role-ambiguous. 3 should_trigger audit-mode (EN with 4-lead artifact + boss critique; JP with 12-KPI dashboard; zh-TW with 4-candidate list + boss critique) match description triggers verbatim. 3 should_not_trigger lures: explicit-role coach (still routes within skill, just skips disambiguation), wrong-stage D3 scoreboard, pre-WIG D1 prerequisite. 2 audit-specific lures: OKR-KR audit without 4DX framing → using-four-dx-coach; cross-layer audit → 4dx-audit. Edge case forces router to surface leader-pre-work tension. Description boundary clauses align with all lures (NOT for cross-layer audit / NOT for OKR audit without 4DX framing / NOT for pre-WIG / NOT for scoreboard).
